name: Code Llama 70B
tagline: Largest Code Llama model, trained on roughly 1T tokens of code; added to the existing 7B/13B/34B sizes.
metaDescription: Code Llama 70B (Meta), released 2024-01-29 — part of the Code Llama line. Largest Code Llama model, trained on roughly 1T tokens of code; added to the existing…
overview: Code Llama 70B is a large language model from Meta, part of the Code Llama line. Released 2024-01-29. Specialized open-weight coding models fine-tuned from Llama 2 for code generation and understanding.
What's notable in this version: Largest Code Llama model, trained on roughly 1T tokens of code; added to the existing 7B/13B/34B sizes.
